description: Allocate needs confirm; public is required by the API (no default) so both languages reject a missing public rather than injecting one; then POSTs the type/public body. No-confirm and missing-type message text diverge (see report).

cases.name: allocates an IP with the type/public body
rejects an invalid type
cases.expect_error: type must be one of: ipv4

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This allocates a new IP address which may incur charges. Set confirm=true to proceed.
